series_metadata.series_title: OHIO SELLERS USE TAX RETURN FORM
series_metadata.series_description: Form is used by person who hold a Sellers Use Tax Account in this State to report county by county breakdown of reportable taxable sales and tax liability.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain in office 5 years then destroy by shredding. ; Paper: Retain in office until such time form is captured on microfilm, then destroy., Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
